name: Twinkie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a pyrex square or rectangular casserole with butter.
2. Cut 8 Twinkies into thirds lengthwise and place one layer on the bottom of the casserole.
3. Beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and sugar until foamy. Add vanilla.
4. Melt chocolate chips in a double boiler.
5. Gradually add egg yolks to the melted chocolate while stirring over boiling water.
6. Fold the chocolate into the egg white mixture.
7. Spread the chocolate mixture over the Twinkies.
8. Sprinkle with about half of the chopped pecans.
9. Layer more Twinkies, more chocolate, and more nuts.
10. Continue layering until topped with whipped cream and a single whole Twinkie.
11. Chill and serve.
